paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, a simplified and efficient Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model that routes each token to a single expert, reducing routing complexity, computation, and communication costs while maintaining model quality
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, pre-training, downstream fine-tuning, multilingual learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with sparse computation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks including question answering, summarization, and knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Uses selective precision training with float32 in the router and bfloat16 elsewhere to stabilize training without sacrificing speed
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends Switch Transformer with larger model dimensions and more parameters, achieving superior scaling and performance while maintaining the same FLOPs per token as the base model
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, pre-training, downstream fine-tuning, multilingual learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with sparse computation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks including question answering, summarization, and knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.extension: FLOP-matched to T5-Large, with expanded hidden dimensions and FFN layers using GEGLU activation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Achieves up to a trillion-parameter scale with efficient sparse routing, demonstrating 4x speedup over T5-XXL in pre-training and superior sample efficiency across tasks
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, pre-training, downstream fine-tuning, multilingual learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with sparse computation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks including question answering, summarization, and knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.extension: FLOP-matched to T5-XXL, with larger dimensions (d_model=4096, d_ff=10240) and 64 heads, enabling high-capacity modeling despite increased communication costs from model parallelism
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Designed with only expert-parallelism and no model parallelism, achieving 4x faster pre-training than T5-XXL with the same compute budget and superior scalability
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, pre-training, downstream fine-tuning, multilingual learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with sparse computation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks including question answering, summarization, and knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Utilizes only expert-parallelism with 2048 experts and 15 layers, minimizing communication overhead while maximizing parameter count
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
